channel.title: Podcast 監察 Podcast Monitor
channel.description: 精選財經及科技 Podcast 最新集數，自動監察更新

item.title: Reese’s heir vs. chocolate skimpflation — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

好時公司因成本上升，被指在Reese's花生醬巧克力中使用替代材料，引發品質縮水爭議。

Live event info and tickets here. When ingredient costs skyrocket, companies have three basic options: They can raise their prices (a sort of product-specific inflation), shrink the size of the products (often called “shrinkflation”), or, sometimes, find more creative ways to reduce costs by degrading the quality of their products - which our very own Greg Rosalsky has dubbed as  “skimpflation.” The latest alleged culprit? Hershey’s. The Hershey Company is using ingredients in some of their Rees...

Duration: 33:42

#Reese's #好時公司 #巧克力 #花生醬 #縮水 #成本 #品質

item.title: Fan Favorite: Japan’s New Horizon — Wall Street Week
item.author: Wall Street Week
item.description:
Wall Street Week

日本經濟在停滯30年後出現新機遇，私人資本和商業改革有望推動其下一輪增長週期。

On this special, fan favorite edition of Bloomberg Wall Street Week, we travel to Japan to bring you stories of how its economy could be turning the page after 30 years of stagnation. After the so-called ‘lost decades,’ Apollo Global Management’s Marc Rowan explains why there’s a ‘new swagger’ in Japan now. Plus, can private capital help power Japan’s next growth cycle? Later, after decades of caution and stability, Japan’s business culture now faces a defining test as reform collides with tradi...

Duration: 48:00

#日本 #經濟 #增長 #私人資本 #商業改革 #失落的十年 #傳統 #創新

item.title: Jobs that new college grads are and are not landing — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

美國就業市場呈「低聘低裁」狀態，僱主既不大幅裁員也不積極招聘，對大學應屆畢業生前景黯淡。

Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com Economists have described the state of the jobs market as “low hire, low fire.” That means employers are not cutting many jobs, but they're also not adding much either, a dismal prospect for many new college grads. On this edition of Jobs Friday, we go to Howard University in Washington, D.C. to see how graduating seniors are faring. Related episodes: Just how bad are these jobs numbers? Do I need a four-ye...

Duration: 8:40

#大學畢業生 #就業市場 #低聘低裁 #霍華德大學 #華盛頓特區 #經濟學家 #職位 #招聘

item.title: The Future of Addictive Design + Going Deep at DeepMind + HatGPT — Hard Fork
item.author: Hard Fork
item.description:
Hard Fork

探討成癮式設計的未來發展、DeepMind的深度研究進展，以及HatGPT相關議題，涉及科技平台監管與法律風險。

“The platforms should be absolutely begging Congress to regulate them because the alternative is they get sued into oblivion by a bunch of law firms.”

Duration: 1:09:26 · Ep. 188

#成癮式設計 #DeepMind #HatGPT #科技平台 #監管 #法律風險 #人工智能

item.title: Scott Bok Explains What Investment Bankers Actually Do All Day — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

投資銀行前行政總裁Scott Bok解析投資銀行家的日常工作職能，探討AI時代對白領工作的潛在衝擊。

There's obviously a lot of talk these days about AI and possible destruction of white collar jobs. Intuitively bankers might be expected to be victims of this. But before we can answer whether AI can disrupt an industry, or a line of work, we have to know what the job actually entails. What do investment bankers actually do, and why are they paid for it? To answer this question, we speak with Scott Bok, the longtime former CEO of the investment bank Greenhill. Scott is also the author of the boo...

Duration: 54:28

#Scott Bok #投資銀行 #投資銀行家 #Greenhill #華爾街 #AI #白領工作 #金融行業

item.title: Trump Made His Case for War With Iran. It Backfired — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普就對伊朗開戰向美國民眾闡述立場，惟其言論自相矛盾且引發市場波動，未能達到預期效果。

After a month of fighting, President Trump took his case for war with Iran to the American people Wednesday night. In a prime-time address that sent energy markets surging, he promised both an imminent end to the conflict and two to three weeks of further intense military strikes. On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder and Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Jeff Mason unpack the president’s brief, often contradictory speech. They discuss how it put investors and key allies on the back fo...

Duration: 18:43

#Trump #伊朗 #宣戰 #軍事打擊 #美國 #能源市場 #中期選舉

item.title: How an energy crisis unfolds — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

探討伊朗戰爭對全球能源供應的衝擊及戰後恢復時間；分析煤炭前景與市場智慧。

World energy supplies have been disrupted by the Iran war. But how long will they take to return to normal after the war is over? Today on the show, Katie Martin and the FT’s energy editor Malcolm Moore game out global energy outcomes. Also, they go long coal and short the wisdom of the markets. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Katie Martin at unhedged@ft.com . Read a transcript of this episode on FT.c...

Duration: 16:47

#能源危機 #伊朗戰爭 #能源供應 #煤炭 #全球能源 #市場 #Katie Martin

item.title: Tesla’s EV Sales Miss Expectations Again in Deepening Slump — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

Tesla電動車銷售連續低迷，季度銷量未達預期，反映電動車市場競爭加劇；Stellantis與中國夥伴探討在加拿大製造電動車方案。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - David Welch, Bloomberg Detroit Bureau Chief, discusses Tesla sales. Tesla Inc. posted one of its worst sales quarters in years, missing Wall Street’s expectations, as the carmaker struggles to turn around its core business and navigate an increasingly challenged electric-vehicle market. Separately, Stellantis is discussing options for building electric vehicles...

Duration: 17:16

#Tesla #電動車銷售 #季度銷量 #Wall Street預期 #電動車市場 #Stellantis #加拿大

item.title: SpaceX Said to File Confidentially for IPO Before AI Rivals — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

SpaceX秘密申報首次公開募股，公司估值可能超過1.75兆美元，有望成為史上規模最大的上市案。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - Anthony Hughes, Bloomberg US Equity Capital Markets Reporter, discusses SpaceX  filing confidentially for an initial public offering, bringing the company closer to delivering the biggest-ever listing. The company submitted its draft IPO registration to the US Securities and Exchange Commission and could seek a valuation in the IPO of more than $1.75 trillion. ...

Duration: 17:44

#SpaceX #首次公開募股 #IPO #秘密申報 #證券交易委員會 #估值 #上市

item.title: This Is How to Tell if Writing Was Made by AI — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討如何識別人工智能生成的文字，分析AI寫作與人類寫作的差異及其社會影響。

When you consider the fact that many people don't know how and where to place a comma, it's safe to say that AI is already better than most people at writing. It's clean copy. It can be surprisingly persuasive. And sometimes, it's even informative. But there's frequently still something about it that just seems... off. Many people can tell quite quickly when they're reading AI-generated text. And beyond the style, the existence of AI generated text has all kinds of ramifications, from making it ...

Duration: 48:32

#AI寫作 #人工智能 #文字識別 #文體分析 #學術誠信 #聊天機械人 #欺騙性內容

item.title: Greetings from: Our favorite public goods — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

節目介紹全球各地傑出的公共產品，如海上自由航行、GPS和大型強子對撞機等，強調其對人類繁榮的重要貢獻。

Freedom of the Seas. GPS. The Large Hadron Collider. These are all public goods that make our world more prosperous, accurate, and knowledgeable. But we don’t always give them the attention they deserve. Today on the show, the Planet Money book’s main author Alex Mayyasi joins us to take an audio world tour of spectacular public goods, one whimsical postcard at a time. These postcards are gorgeously illustrated in the Planet Money book . Come see Planet Money live on stage in April! 12 cities. D...

Duration: 6:52

#公共產品 #Planet Money #Alex Mayyasi #GPS #大型強子對撞機 #自由航行 #明信片 #現場表演

item.title: Economic warfare: lessons from history, with Mark Harrison — The Economics Show
item.author: The Economics Show
item.description:
The Economics Show

經濟戰爭由來已久，制裁、關稅、封鎖等經濟手段究竟是否有效？節目探討歷史教訓如何解讀伊朗及俄羅斯等當代案例。

Warring countries have attacked each other’s economies for hundreds of years. But do the tools of economic warfare – sanctions, tariffs, blockades and embargoes – actually work? Soumaya speaks to Mark Harrison, emeritus professor of economics at Warwick university, and co-editor (with Stephen Broadberry) of Economic Warfare and Sanctions since 1688 , about what centuries of economic conflict can teach us about Iran (and Russia) today. Subscribe to Soumaya's show on Apple , Spotify , Pocket Casts...

Duration: 26:05

#經濟戰爭 #制裁 #關稅 #馬克·哈里遜 #歷史 #伊朗 #俄羅斯 #經濟衝突

item.title: Special Report: President Trump's Prime Time Address — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普在黃宮黃金時段演講中警告將在未來兩至三週內對伊朗「極其強硬」回應，並威脅打擊電力等關鍵基礎設施，引發股市下跌和油價飆升。

US President Donald Trump spoke for nearly 20 minutes from the White House, saying the US would hit Iran “extremely hard” in the next two to three weeks, and that he’d strike key infrastructure like electric plants if no deal is reached. Stocks fell and oil jumped on his comments, with Brent rising 5% as Trump talked about possible escalation and reiterated his call for other nations to step in to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This is a developing story. We are live blogging at Bloomberg.co...

Duration: 18:23

#特朗普 #伊朗 #白宮 #黃金時段演講 #基礎設施 #荷爾木茲海峽 #油價 #股市

item.title: Dark times for Cuba’s economic experiment — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

古巴經濟實驗陷入困境，美國禁運導致油氣短缺，引發醫療、運輸及電力危機。

Live event info and tickets here. For more than 60 years, Cuba has survived on two seemingly contradictory economic strategies: leaning on friendly communist and socialist countries, and flirting with capitalism. And right now it seems the US is making both strategies impossible. Since January, the U.S. has been preventing almost all oil from reaching the island. Doctors can’t get to the hospitals where they work, many buses aren’t running, trucks can’t deliver food and medicine where they’re ne...

Duration: 27:41

#古巴 #經濟危機 #美國禁運 #石油短缺 #醫療危機 #電力短缺 #共產主義 #資本主義

item.title: Meet OpenClaw: The AI Craze Sweeping China — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

中國AI熱潮中的OpenClaw應用快速爆紅，驅動力來自FOMO心態與政府推動，但隨著代理AI系統獲得個人數據權限，「失控」事件頻現引發安全隱憂。

Fueled by a powerful mix of FOMO and a government drive to accelerate AI adoption, OpenClaw has exploded in popularity across China. But as these agentic systems gain sweeping access to personal data, reports of them “going rogue” are beginning to surface. On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, host K. Oanh Ha sits down with Bloomberg’s Luz Ding and Bloomberg Opinion’s Catherine Thorbecke to dig into the rapid rise of agentic AI in China, why it has taken hold so quickly and the mounting security con...

Duration: 18:37

#OpenClaw #中國 #AI #代理AI系統 #個人數據 #安全隱憂 #政府推動 #FOMO

item.title: Javier Blas on Why Oil Could Go Much, Much Higher — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

石油價格因伊朗戰爭大幅上升，但仍有進一步上漲空間；荷姆茲海峽關閉造成供應中斷，東亞地區受影響最大。

Oil has shot up by a lot since the start of war with Iran. But it could still get much worse. So far, the massive disruption (due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz) has been cushioned by the drawing down of inventories and distributions from strategic stockpiles. Meanwhile, there is some oil still on tankers that has yet to be delivered. According to Bloomberg Opinion columnist Javier Blas, the potential remains for oil to go much, much higher. On this episode, we speak with Javier about th...

Duration: 41:06

#石油 #伊朗 #荷姆茲海峽 #Javier Blas #油價上漲 #戰爭 #東亞 #供應中斷

item.title: Why Pokémon cards are growing faster than your retirement account — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

寶可夢卡牌價值在過去一年暴漲170%，增速遠超退休基金，成為投資熱門商品。

Pokémon cards are scorching hot right now. An index tracking the thousands of rare cards shows that valuations have increased 170% in the last year alone. Growth like that really makes you wish you hadn’t given away all your childhood cards years ago. Today on the show, we cover three things that are contributing to the rapid growth of shiny cards produced by the world’s highest-grossing media franchise. Come see Planet Money live on stage in April! 12 cities. Details and tix here: https://tix.t...

Duration: 9:12

#寶可夢卡牌 #投資 #價值增長 #收藏品 #稀有卡牌 #媒體特許經營

item.title: Finale: The collapse of India’s $22bn tech star — Behind the Money
item.author: Behind the Money
item.description:
Behind the Money

印度教育科技獨角獸Byju's在疫情期間迅速崛起，卻同樣迅速走向崩潰，涉及美國法庭制裁和妨礙司法指控，反映印度科技業的風險。

For our final episode: Education start-up Byju’s quickly became the pride of India during the Covid-19 pandemic. But almost as fast as the company rose, it collapsed. The fallout has already resulted in millions of dollars’ worth of US court sanctions and allegations of witness tampering. The FT’s Mumbai bureau chief Chris Kay has been following the legal drama and examines what Byju’s demise means for India’s burgeoning technology sector. Clips from Byju’s, US Bankruptcy Court - District of Del...

Duration: 31:13

#Byju's #印度 #科技 #破產 #教育應用 #疫情 #美國法庭 #崩潰

item.title: Trump Threatens Iran's Water — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普政府威脅摧毀伊朗水利設施以施壓談判，引發中東人道主義危機隱憂。

A month into the Iran War, the Trump administration continues to send mixed messages about when and how it will end. In addition to threats on electricity plants and oil wells if a deal isn’t reached, the president said he would consider destroying another piece of critical infrastructure: Iran’s water desalination plants. On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder talks to Bloomberg defense policy and intelligence reporter Peter Martin about the Middle East’s reliance on desalination, the p...

Duration: 16:31

#Trump #伊朗 #水利設施 #談判 #中東 #人道危機 #基礎設施
